segments.text: Uh, the sun comin' up like it know something
We been waitin' on the light
Same desk, same chair, same old ceiling
Boss man talkin', but I lost that feelin'
Two weeks off, if the stars line up
But the flight cost more than the whole damn check
Everybody sayin', hold on, stay safe
Clock keep beatin' up another good day
I used to let you lie, just slide right by
Like the sun was free, but it wasn't mine
Scrollin' on the phone while the world got loud
Everybody buildin', I was sittin' in doubt
talk, thought it wasn't for me
Now I'm lookin' at the wave like,
No suitcase yet, but the plane got motion
Gotta build that life before I leave that dream
We don't wanna waste no weather
One more spark and we come alive
One more step and we change the vibe
Got the sun on our shoulders
Got a friend who gave me flame
One more waitin' on some day
We gon' learn a little something
We gon' build our own way
Pour it up, let it breathe
But we workin' while it glows
But the mind don't know the drive
I ain't tryna be an appetite face
Calm down Friday like an escape
But one Monday feelin' like my own damn lane
Not a locked up loop with a different name
So I'm divin' in, no perfect start
No fancy degree, just a hungry heart
Prompt by prompt, I'm learnin' the flow
Ask better questions, watch better door show
Build me a buy, build me a site
Build me a plan for a better life
Automate the boring, sharpen the brain
Turn small sparks into summer rain
Everybody wants to be a star in the sky
On the beach with no pressure code
Drank clean sky time, you can measure
But that kind of beast don't fall from blue
You gotta make the machine start workin' for you
Focus in the morning, rhythm at night
Discipline wasn't with me on life
Will in my chest, hunger in my shoes
The same motivation, this is somethin' to prove
We don't wanna waste no weather
One more spark and we come alive
One more step and we change the vibe
This is the time to be a star in the sky
We ain't lettin' it fade away
Got the sun on our shoulders
Got a brand new bling to slay
We gon' build our own way
Pour it up, up, let it breathe
But we workin' while it glows
Imagine all along with a panic
And ain't no boss in your head every single minute
Just waste good friends in the room to breathe
But first we plant the seed
Imagine that view with your name on it
That little idea with flame on it
Not chasing luck, we make it move
I used to say I'm stuck, now I say I'm loaded
Used to watch the door, now the code is opening
Used to call the noise, now I hear the signal
Little by little the vision gets official
No more sleep walking through the sunshine
No more waiting for the right time
Yeah, this is the right time
Cold dream, clear mind, new gear
Got the sun on our shoulders
Got a brand new game to swing
We gon' learn a little something
We gon' build our own way
But we working while it glows
